coreValues.title: Core Values
coreValues.val1_desc: Data accuracy is non-negotiable. Every metric tells a real story.
coreValues.val2_desc: The digital ecosystem mutates. Evolving fast is the only constant.
coreValues.val3_desc: Clear communication. Clean code. Dashboards that don't hide the truth.

story.ch1_txt: Born in 2001 in Puente Alto, Chile. Growing up in this peripheral area was my first indirect contact with structural inequality.
story.ch2_txt: Working at the local market, I understood economics from its most human base, sparking my interest in macroeconomic variables.
story.ch3_txt: Working in retail taught me that quality and human connection reside in the details. I understood the daily operations of massive companies.
story.ch4_txt: Studying Software Engineering allowed me to merge my interest in social impact with technology, solving systemic inequalities with cloud architecture.
story.ch5_txt: I dove into Python, Power BI, and AI. My goal is to transform access to information so economic understanding is no longer a privilege.
story.ch6_txt: E2E automation development with Python & SQL. Created 'AI Copilot', an LLM agent designed to democratize access to metrics with 90% effectiveness.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.p1_txt: Modular and integral platform for ground logistics management. Includes route optimization and real-time control tower to reduce costs.
projects.p2_txt: Mental health project integrating an emotional diary and qualitative analysis using conversational AI and NLP.
projects.p3_txt: Development of a modern online catalog and store, including abandoned cart recovery and fast user experience.
projects.p4_txt: Deep research focused on social dynamics, data crossing, and qualitative analysis combining rigor and empathy.

contact.title: Let's Talk?
contact.subtitle: I'm always open to discussing new projects, automation ideas, or just grabbing a virtual coffee.

form.name: Name
form.msgPH: Hi! I'd like to talk about...

vision.title: Understanding the Ecosystem
vision.text: For me, programming and data are not ends in themselves, but the most powerful tools to analyze and propose large-scale solutions. My long-term professional goal is driven by a deep desire to understand and influence real-world dynamics.
vision.n1_desc: Analysis of economic cycles, wealth distribution, and how data reflects global financial engines.
vision.n2_desc: Understanding collective human behavior, demographic trends, and the impact of technology on society.
vision.n3_desc: Development of data-driven technological solutions designed to support decision-making and civil well-being.

tastes.title: Gastronomy & Little Pleasures
tastes.t1_desc: My favorite cuisine, where simplicity and quality ingredients are everything.
tastes.t2_desc: The perfect fuel for long hours of data analysis and programming.
tastes.t3_desc: My favorite fruit. A fresh and sour touch that balances any time of day.

extras.title: Beyond the code
extras.lib_desc: Special mention for having my collection of Papelucho volumes again.

gallery.title: My Lens & Environment
gallery.desc: A small visual collection documenting my passion for photography, design, and my surroundings.
